meaning: n.慎打,阻碍或妨碍议程,石墙
examples: After 18 days of stonewalling, he at last came out and faced the issue.
Stonewalling or avoiding conflicts is NOT managing them.
That is where we stand now - NV is simply stonewalling everyone and the costs are adding up.
Mr. Holder has helped escalate the issue into a contempt vote by his stonewalling response.
The passage of time is irrelevant when considering the stonewalling by banks and insurers.
